ai-assistant.name: AI Assistant
ai-assistant.description: LLM-based coding assistant managing project specs

developer.name: Software Developer
developer.description: Developer using know to manage product specs

query-graph.name: Query Graph
query-graph.description: Query product and code structure efficiently

schema-agnostic-know.name: Schema-Agnostic Know
schema-agnostic-know.description: Enable know to validate against custom LLM-defined schemas instead of hardcoded dependency rules

graph-embeddings.name: Graph Embeddings
graph-embeddings.description: Semantic search layer over spec-graph using vector embeddings for natural language queries and auto-suggestions

beads-integration.name: Beads Integration
beads-integration.description: Seamless integration with Beads task management system, with native JSONL alternative for users who prefer built-in task tracking

cli-commands.name: CLI Commands
cli-commands.description: Command handlers for all CLI operations

graph-operations.name: Graph Operations
graph-operations.description: Core graph CRUD and query operations

schema-loader.name: Schema Loader
schema-loader.description: Loads and normalizes schemas from both new and legacy formats

field-validator.name: Field Validator
field-validator.description: Validates entity fields against schema requirements (required/optional fields)

schema-detector.name: Schema Detector
schema-detector.description: Auto-detects schema path from graph metadata or uses legacy auto-detection

embedding-generator.name: Embedding Generator
embedding-generator.description: Generates vector embeddings from graph node text using sentence-transformers MiniLM model

similarity-search.name: Similarity Search
similarity-search.description: Performs cosine similarity lookups against embedded vectors to find semantically related nodes

auto-embed-hook.name: Auto Embed Hook
auto-embed-hook.description: Triggers incremental embedding regeneration when graph is modified via add/link/unlink commands

beads-bridge.name: Beads Bridge
beads-bridge.description: Integration layer between know CLI and Beads bd commands, handling initialization, passthrough, and JSONL parsing

task-manager.name: Task Manager
task-manager.description: Native JSONL-based task system with hash IDs, dependency tracking, and auto-ready detection as Beads alternative

task-sync.name: Task Sync
task-sync.description: Bidirectional sync engine between Beads/native tasks and spec-graph feature entities

task-cli.name: Task CLI
task-cli.description: CLI commands for task management: know beads/task subcommands with feature linking

load-custom-schema.name: Load Custom Schema
load-custom-schema.description: Load and normalize schema from file (new or legacy format)

validate-entity-fields.name: Validate Entity Fields
validate-entity-fields.description: Validate entity has required fields and no unknown fields per schema

detect-schema-path.name: Detect Schema Path
detect-schema-path.description: Auto-detect schema path from graph metadata or fall back to legacy rules

embed-graph.name: Embed Graph
embed-graph.description: Generate vector embeddings for all graph nodes and store in embeddings file

semantic-search.name: Semantic Search
semantic-search.description: Query graph nodes using natural language and return semantically similar results

suggest-dependencies.name: Suggest Dependencies
suggest-dependencies.description: Recommend potential dependencies for a node based on semantic similarity

initialize-beads.name: Initialize Beads
initialize-beads.description: Set up Beads integration in .ai/beads/ with symlink to .beads for bd CLI compatibility

sync-tasks.name: Sync Tasks
sync-tasks.description: Bidirectionally sync tasks between Beads/native system and spec-graph features

manage-tasks.name: Manage Tasks
manage-tasks.description: Create, list, update, and complete tasks with feature linking and auto-ready detection
